creator: jau@iki.fi
text:
Apparently this might be to somehow incomplete dependency
	specifications or something similar.

	After a couple of rounds of csup and "pkg_replace -a" over
	the whole ports tree Firefox-3 suddenly compiled again.


	Cheers,
		// jau
